text.title: django-api Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure to bring a Django API surface to compliance.

list.item: Grep views/ for ORM calls and external API calls.
Move flagged code to services/ + integrations/.
Replace `def fn(request, ...)` with `def fn(user, ...)` taking domain types.
Update view to pass `request.user` and validated data explicitly.
Decorate each ViewSet with @extend_schema or generate schema via introspection.
Set max page_size at 100. Switch large endpoints to CursorPagination.
Wire the RFC-7807 exception handler via DRF's EXCEPTION_HANDLER setting.
Re-test all 4xx responses against the schema.
